calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearance: Drexel A. Bradshaw, Esq. and Natasha Baker, Esq. for Plaintiff
Anna M. Perez for Plaintiff
Ora Shelee Prochovnick, Esq. and Jessica Alexandra, Certified Legal Intern, for Defendant
Defendant was on telephone standby

The parties entered into a written stipulation for entry of judgment that was not filed by agreement of the parties.
The main terms of the agreement are as follows:
Defendant will vacate the premisses located at 3155 24th Street, San Francisco, CA by 4/6/04. Plaintiff waives back rent.
If Defendant does not vacate by 4/6/04, judgment shall be entered.
Court waives appearance from settlement conference by Defendant due to illness that is disclosed in the court file.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk, Marjorie Schwartz-Scott CSR: Noreen Ikeuye

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Dec-15-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jessica Alexandra, CLI, New College of California School of Law (415) 982-8399 for Defendant and Moving Party Santiago
Mary J. Bosworth, Esq., Bradshaw & Associates (415) 433-4800 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT PENNY SANTIAGO'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND: GRANTED; no opposition filed. Order signed. (301/JLW) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
